variants.title: Donaldson P525697 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-62010
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P525697 Air Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-62010
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P525697 Air Oil Separator is designed to separate oil from compressed air systems, reducing oil carryover and improving air quality. It enhances system efficiency and protects downstream equipment. Built with durable materials, this separator ensures reliable operation in industrial and automotive applications.

variants.title: HiFi Filter OS 5110 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-62010
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter OS 5110 Air/Oil Separator | Replaces the Sakura SA-62010
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter OS 5110 Air/Oil Separator is HiFi's replacement to the SAKURA SA-62010. Easy to install and replace, the OS 5110 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR/OIL SEPARATOR, Dimension 1 (D1): 180.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 145.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 93.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 290.0 mm
